_comments: The build copies cloud-5 sources in the root directory to strudel/website/dist. The cloud-5 Web site runs from strudel/website/dist. On pnpm install, scripts/install-csound-wasm-dist.sh installs csound-wasm (local dist when present, else verified repo copy, else GitHub release) and scripts/verify-csound-wasm-dist.sh rejects builds without Wasm heap growth. pnpm.allowBuilds documents approved native build scripts; pnpm 11 applies root approval via pnpm-workspace.yaml and Strudel via install-strudel (--config.dangerouslyAllowAllBuilds=true) without editing the strudel submodule.

scripts.setup: git submodule update --init --recursive --remote && cd strudel && git stash && git checkout main && git pull && cd .. && git commit -a -m 'Updated Strudel from origin.'
scripts.build-strudel: pnpm run install-strudel && pnpm --dir strudel run build
scripts.jsdoc: pnpm run generate-csoundac-jsdoc && jsdoc -c jsdoc.json -d jsdocs
scripts.document: pandoc --css readme.css -s --metadata title='cloud-music' --ascii CLOUD-MUSIC.md -o cloud-music.html && pnpm run jsdoc
scripts.dist:rename-strudel-index: sh -c 'cd strudel/website/dist && [ -f index.html ] && mv -f index.html strudel_repl.html || true'
scripts.dist:copy-root-state-json: bash -lc 'shopt -s nullglob && for f in *.state.json; do cp -f "$f" strudel/website/dist/; done'
scripts.dist:promote-cloud5-index: sh -c 'cd strudel/website/dist && [ -f cloud-5-index.html ] && mv -f cloud-5-index.html index.html || echo "cloud-5-index.html not found; skipped"'
scripts.build: pnpm run install-csound-wasm && pnpm run document && pnpm run build-strudel && pnpm run dist:rename-strudel-index && pnpm run dist:copy-root-files && pnpm run dist:copy-root-state-json && pnpm run dist:copy-root-jsdocs && pnpm run dist:promote-cloud5-index && pnpm run dist:static-site && pnpm run package
scripts.local: pnpm run marshal && cd strudel/website/dist && echo 'Serving cloud-5 at http://localhost:8000/ (standalone: /scrims.html)' && python3 -m http.server
